mapper.sql: s.create_user_id = #{userId} AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(s.title, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(s.description, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(s.location, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.company_name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(ct.name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_schedule s LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN crm_contact ct ON s.contact_id = ct.contact_id WHERE

SELECT 'schedule' AS type, s.schedule_id AS record_id, s.title, CONCAT_WS(' · ', NULLIF(c.company_name, ''), NULLIF(s.type, ''), NULLIF(s.location, '')) AS subtitle, s.description AS content, s.customer_id, s.contact_id, s.start_time AS event_time, s.create_time, s.create_time AS update_time FROM crm_schedule s LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN crm_contact ct ON s.contact_id = ct.contact_id WHERE ORDER BY s.start_time DESC NULLS LAST, s.schedule_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
